apiVersion.description:
APIVersion defines the versioned schema of this representation of an object.
Servers should convert recognized schemas to the latest internal value, and
may reject unrecognized values.
More info: https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/devel/sig-architecture/api-conventions.md#resources

items.description:
Describe detailed multi-region configuration of the subject
Entry describe a set of nodepools and their shared or identical configurations

Item represents configuration to be injected.
Only one of its members may be specified.

image.description: ImageItem specifies the corresponding container and the claimed image

containerName.description:
ContainerName represents name of the container
in which the Image will be replaced

imageClaim.description:
ImageClaim represents the claimed image name
which is injected into the container above

patches.description: Convert Patch struct into json patch operation

path.description: Path represents the path in the json patch

value.description: Indicates the value of json patch

kind.description:
Kind is a string value representing the REST resource this object represents.
Servers may infer this from the endpoint the client submits requests to.
Cannot be updated.
In CamelCase.
More info: https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/devel/sig-architecture/api-conventions.md#types-kinds

name.description: Name is the name of YurtAppSet or YurtAppDaemon
